title: Jshutter Configuration Schema
description: Schema for jshutter screenshot automation tool configurations

$schema.description: Path or URL to the Jshutter validation schema

global.description: Global default options applied to all tasks unless overridden

baseUrl.description: Base URL resolved against relative task URLs (e.g., 'https://example.com' or 'http://localhost:3000')

baseOutputDir.description: Base output directory for saving screenshots and reports

fullPage.description: Capture the full scrollable page instead of just the active viewport

delay.description: Delay in milliseconds to wait before capturing the screenshot

maxPageHeight.description: Maximum page height in pixels for fullPage screenshots (use 0 for unlimited)

quality.description: Image quality (only applicable to jpeg format)

timeout.description: Playwright action and navigation timeout limit in milliseconds

userAgent.description: Custom User-Agent header string to use in the browser

colorScheme.description: Emulate color scheme media preferences (light/dark mode)

report.description: Type of test execution report to generate

embedBase64.description: If true, screenshots are embedded inside the HTML report as Base64. If false, relative image path links are used instead

headed.description: Run the browser in headed mode (shows visible browser window)

parallel.description: Max number of browser tasks to execute concurrently

saveStorageState.description: Global default path to save Playwright BrowserContext authentication state

storageState.description: Global default path to load Playwright BrowserContext authentication state

actions.description: Global actions sequence performed on every task page before capturing

presets.description: Named viewport dimension presets mapping custom names to width and height

macros.description: Re-usable macro names mapping to their custom Javascript script file paths

setupTasks.description: List of setup tasks executed sequentially to prepare storage/login states

tasks.description: List of individual pages/URLs to capture and their task-level overrides

id.description: Unique identifier for the capture task

url.description: The target URL or relative path (resolved against global.baseUrl) to capture

output.description: Target file destination path for the screenshot (relative to global.baseOutputDir)

tags.description: Category tags for grouping and filtering in the report

actions.description: Task-specific actions sequence to execute before capturing

saveStorageState.description: File path (relative to configuration folder) to save the Playwright BrowserContext authentication state (cookies & localStorage) after successful task execution

storageState.description: File path (relative to configuration folder) to load Playwright BrowserContext authentication state (cookies & localStorage) before task execution starts

anyOf.description: Preset name (e.g. 'desktop', 'mobile') or custom string widthxheight (e.g. '800x600')

viewportSingleOrArray.description: Single viewport or array of viewports (can be preset names, resolution strings, or objects)

value.description: Action value input (e.g., text to write, wait milliseconds, scroll direction/lazy)

optional.description: If true, click actions will not fail the execution if selector is not found

clear.description: If true, clears the input field before typing (type action)

name.description: Name of macro script file to execute

url.description: Target destination URL to navigate to

timeout.description: Specific timeout in milliseconds for this action step

key.description: Key name for keyboard press or storage key for set_storage

fields.description: Form input elements fields array for fill_form action

clear.description: If true, clears the field before typing

output.description: Custom file path for an intermediate capture screenshot

script.description: JavaScript code to execute via page.evaluate()
